title: Cavern Root
description: Having to stop mining because you are out of food is annoying. With this vanilla like mod a new plant will appear, the Cavern Root, which spawns in caves.
body:
![Thumbnail of cavern root mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6b6d4f434cb848584da12e51c7feae2b9b6b309.jpeg)

## 🫚 Description
### I ONLY MAINTAIN THE MOD FOR SOME MINECRAFT VERSIONS!
Adds the **Cavern Root**. A new plant that spawns in caves and functions as extra food for starving players. With this mod, you will never have to stop mining because you run out of food!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/OOYN8MyYDsQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![Patch of cavern roots in a dripstone cave](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b5a07e479ae3135725c9f571d5b44cc970eaf6b4.jpeg)

## 📖 Features
1. **Cavern Root**. It _generates naturally_ in most caves. Does not spawn in lush caves as the Glow Berries are enough for that biome.
2. **Twisted Cavern Root**. _Crafted_ from a single Cavern Root. It is edible and replenishes 3 hunger (1.5 chicken icons).
3. **Lumen Root**. A mutated Cavern Root found below y = 0. It also emits light.

### Expect more versions!

# Check out my other mods!

[![Desolate Dwellings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6177583fbd64a2a5eeb04e43c41fe94d7c35bfcf.jpeg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/desolate-dwellings)
